artifacts.summary: Comprehensive analysis identifying that skill tool only loads definitions, doesn't execute workflows. Commands must implement preflight/postflight status updates themselves, not rely on skills to do it.
Revised 6-phase plan with clarifications: bug documentation added, risk upgraded to High, new success criterion for automatic status updates without orchestrator intervention

active_projects.description: Fix the issue where task status is not being updated to [COMPLETED] after implementation finishes. The skill tool only loads skill definitions but doesn't execute the preflight/postflight workflow defined in SKILL.md files. After implementing OC_151, state.json still shows 'planning', TODO.md shows [PLANNING], and the plan file header shows [NOT STARTED].

Fix git commit co-author attribution showing 'Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5' when using Kimi K2.5 in OpenCode. The commit messages incorrectly attribute co-authorship to Claude Opus when the actual model being used is Kimi K2.5. Need to investigate where this attribution is coming from and either correct it to reflect the actual model or remove it entirely.

artifacts.summary: Comprehensive research report identifying 47+ references to skill-remember and /remember across the OpenCode system. Categorized by priority (Critical, High, Medium, Low) and provided clean-break rename recommendations based on OC_142 precedent.

active_projects.description: Rename the /remember command to /learn throughout the OpenCode system. This involves: 1) Renaming skill-remember/ directory to skill-learn/, 2) Updating SKILL.md to register as /learn command, 3) Updating any documentation references, 4) Ensuring backward compatibility if needed.

artifacts.summary: Comprehensive analysis of Neovim and WezTerm configurations showing no automatic directory-changing behavior
Research report documenting OAuth2 token expiration as root cause and fix procedure
3-phase implementation plan for fixing Gmail OAuth2 authentication
Research on systemd user service configuration for ProtonMail Bridge auto-start, covering best practices, home-manager integration patterns, and implementation recommendations
4-phase plan covering service verification, integration testing, and documentation for ProtonMail Bridge systemd user service
